inspection_plan_when_access_available.step_1: List all documents in projection-related Drive folders
inspection_plan_when_access_available.step_2: Categorize by projection (UMH, EOS, CreatorOS, LyfeOS, shared)
inspection_plan_when_access_available.step_3: Extract document titles, modified dates, owners
inspection_plan_when_access_available.step_5: Cross-reference claims against actual code state
inspection_plan_when_access_available.step_6: Flag stale docs (claims contradicting current code)

required_access_action.option_a: Provide Google service account JSON with Drive read scope
required_access_action.option_b: Run OAuth2 flow for Drive API in an interactive session
required_access_action.option_c: Operator manually exports key docs as PDF/text and places in data/umh/projection_reconciliation/google_docs/

impact_of_blocker: Cannot verify whether Google Docs contain architecture decisions or product specs that diverge from code. Cross-source reconciliation will be incomplete for documentation layer.
